mechanics.text:
CHARACTER CREATION
FREELANCE TECHNICIAN
Born on the planet Layover; you grew
privileged; your  father was the count/CEO of the local division of Quickscell Company: Your family sent you t0 preparatory school, where you let them down by falling in love with commoner: Though you stood by him_ you earned the enmity Of fellow noble student dis: gusted by your slumming: In a attempt to raise your standards your parents sent you t0 the prestigious New Avalon Institute Science_ Having grown around vehicles you had natural fascination with machines, so you majored in that subject: School went well; your professor excelled in his field, and you went shooting weekends with your  friends at Ine New Avalon Military Academy: You also indulged your love poetry visiting Avalon City's famed Ink District. You soon moved on t0 advanced studies in vehicle maintenance . while continuing your friendship with your buddies at NAMA Your postgraduate studies took you on tour of the major factories in the Federated Suns that produce civilian and combat vehicles. teaching you many skills you never thought you' possess; In anticipation of one day stepping into your father"' place you took job as vehicle maintenance specialist at Kallon Industries on Nanking: Much to your shock, you hated it; Your lackluster performance ended in horrible coolant accident that permanently damaged most of your skin; You cannot tolerate direct sunlight without complete coverage for more than few hours_ Somewhat disillusioned about civil: ian jobs_ but with Iot of money from the accident settlement, you threw yourself into your first love vehicle maintenance and mastered every aspect of it. With plenty of money and no desire for standard job, you have become adept at fixing just about any vehicle and are look- ing for any job that will take you away from boring civilian life However, you can" seem to set aside your noble origins_ which tend to make you snobbish:
Affiliation: Federated Suns (p. 261; Stage 1: Early Childhood (Nobility) Event Roll 341. Stage 2: Late Childhood (Preparatory School} Event Roll 391. Stage 3: Higher Education (New Avalon Institute of Science: Civilian Tech Major) Event Roll 12, then 42). Stage Higher Education (NAIS Advanced Studies Vehicle Technician) Event Roll 421. Stoge Real Life (Postgraduate Studies) Event Roll (p. 49). Stage Real Life (Civilian Job) Event Roll 47) Stage Reat Life (Ne 'er-Do-Well) Event Roll 10 (p_ 491.
